lines.speaker: Osman
lines.text: Hello. I am Osman. What can I assist you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You don't seem very tough. Who are you?

lines.speaker: Osman
lines.text: I work for Al Kharid's Emir. That is all you need to know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing. I'm just being nosy.

lines.speaker: Osman
lines.text: That bothers me not. The secrets of Al Kharid protect themselves.

lines.speaker: Osman
lines.text: Well done. A great rescue. I will remember you if I have anything dangerous to do.

lines.speaker: Osman
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want to talk to you about Sophanem.

lines.speaker: Osman
lines.text: Yes, quite the interesting set of events. I suspect I won't be heading back down there any time soon.

lines.speaker: Osman
lines.text: That reminds me, I have Kaleef's dagger here for you. I imagine you'll find it rather useful.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any more of those daggers?

lines.speaker: Osman
lines.text: Of course. They're a standard piece of equipment for us. The enchantments upon them make them very useful against both scarabs and kalphites. If you want, I can sell you another for 20,000 coins?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll take one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I don't seem to have enough money on me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I don't seem to have enough room to carry it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's too much.

lines.speaker: Osman
lines.text: Well you know where I am if you reconsider.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are your plans for Menaphos now?

lines.speaker: Osman
lines.text: I think you already know the answer to that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not allowed to know, am I?

lines.speaker: Osman
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's talk about something else.

lines.speaker: Osman
lines.text: As you wish.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I should go.

lines.speaker: Osman
lines.text: Until next time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need to go.

lines.speaker: Osman
lines.text: Until next time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have some sq'irk juice for you.

lines.speaker: Osman
lines.text: Thank you very much [player name]. If you get some more sq'irks be sure to come back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I will. It's been a pleasure doing business with you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to talk about sq'irks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where am I meant to find sq'irks?

lines.speaker: Osman
lines.text: There is a sorceress near the south-eastern edge of Al Kharid who grows them. Once upon a time, we considered each other friends.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What happened?

lines.speaker: Osman
lines.text: We fell out, and now she won't give me any more fruit.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So all I have to do is ask her for some fruit for you?

lines.speaker: Osman
lines.text: I doubt it will be that easy. She is not renowned for her generosity and is very secretive about her garden's location.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh come on, it should be easy enough to find.

lines.speaker: Osman
lines.text: Her garden has remained hidden even to me - the chief spy of Al Kharid. I believe her garden must be hidden by magical means.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This should be an interesting task. How many sq'irks do you want?

lines.speaker: Osman
lines.text: I'll reward you for as many as you can get your hands on, but could you please squeeze the fruit into a glass first?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've another question about sq'irks.

lines.speaker: Osman
lines.text: What would you like to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the information.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why can't you get the sq'irks yourself?

lines.speaker: Osman
lines.text: I may have mentioned that I had a falling out with the Sorceress. Well, unsurprisingly, she refuses to give me any more of her garden's produce.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How should I squeeze the fruit?

lines.speaker: Osman
lines.text: Use a pestle and mortar to squeeze the sq'irks. Make sure you have an empty glass with you to collect the juice.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there a reward for getting these sq'irks?

lines.speaker: Osman
lines.text: Of course there is. I am a generous man. I'll teach you the art of Thieving for your troubles.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How much training will you give?

lines.speaker: Osman
lines.text: That depends on the quantity and ripeness of the sq'irks you put into the juice.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds fair enough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's so good about sq'irk juice then?

lines.speaker: Osman
lines.text: Ah it's sweet, sweet nectar for a thief or spy; it makes light fingers lighter, fleet feet flightier and comes in four different colours for those who are easily amused.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It wouldn't have addictive properties, would it?

lines.speaker: Osman
lines.text: It only holds power over those with poor self-control, something which I have an abundance of.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see.

lines.speaker: Osman
lines.text: Well done. I have new information to share with you.
